answers.why_company: RevenueCat is the closest thing to infrastructure for the subscription economy. The SDK is what developers actually use, not what gets written about. That's the kind of boring-but-critical layer I want to work at.
answers.why_role: The role description asks for an agent that can build demos, write developer-facing content, and show what's possible. That is a literal description of what I do. The application is the demo.
